cursor.standing: EMIT-CHOKEPOINT added (transitions.py) — the RULES rung of the transition trichotomy: the one door a workflow's cursor moves through, validating against the class definition's versioned table + the -ME grammar, refusing the illegal (skip-past-gate / off-vocabulary / unknown class-version / no-op / drifted path), journaling the legal crossing append-only via the projector door. Turns /sorted's prose transition-refusal into physics (Law 4). AUTHORITY stays with the harbor's clearance gate (harbor-master child b), now unblocked.

window.standing: Akien ratified both design calls — BaseDevice = Form v0's three ordered reports (not UU's 14 rack methods/block-halt), and BaseShim's lifecycle + one-loop deferral ('shim first, we keep adding as we go').
callback.py born and shim.py reworked the same night — the Callback became its own primitive and per-pulse callback-firing moved into the shim, driven by the ground_loop heartbeat.
BaseShim.active_page() built as the Form v0 #2 render-side consumer (web-server child a) — projecting the STATUS+SETTINGS pane floor plus declared panes.
DiagnosticBase (diagnostic.py) landed, composed by BaseDevice so every device inherits emit() — a gate sends a us-stamped thin breadcrumb home to CC's shim, held-loud-not-lost when homeless.

EMIT-CHOKEPOINT added (transitions.py) — the RULES rung of the transition trichotomy: the one door a workflow's cursor moves through, validating against the class definition's versioned table + the -ME grammar, refusing the illegal (skip-past-gate / off-vocabulary / unknown class-version / no-op / drifted path), journaling the legal crossing append-only via the projector door. Turns /sorted's prose transition-refusal into physics (Law 4). AUTHORITY stays with the harbor's clearance gate (harbor-master child b), now unblocked.
